prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S8.3 八门禁全链路集成验证
prompt.sub_stage_name: 八门禁全链路集成验证 — 全部 8 道门禁端到端测试
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Coach Track S8.3 实现者。 你的任务是：创建 tests/test_s8_full_chain_integration.py， 编写完整的八门禁端到端集成验证测试。 覆盖全部 8 道门禁的 pass/fail/hybrid 场景和 gate 交互测试。
prompt.context:
contracts/gates.json 全部 8 道门禁定义：
| Gate | 名称 | 指标 | 实现来源 | |------|------|------|---------| | 1 | Agency Gate | premise_rewrite_rate | src/coach/agent.py act() 返回 | | 2 | Excursion Gate | effective_exploration_evidence | src/coach/agent.py excursion | | 3 | Learning Gate | no_assist_trajectory | src/coach/agent.py no_assist | | 4 | Relational Gate | compliance_signal_score | src/coach/agent.py relational_safety | | 5 | Causal Gate | causal_diagnostics_triple | src/coach/diagnostics.py DiagnosticEngine | | 6 | Audit Gate | audit_health | src/coach/audit_health.py AuditHealthScorer (S8.1) | | 7 | Framing Gate | independent_framing_audit_pass | src/coach/gates_v18_7.py ManipulationGate | | 8 | Window Gate | window_schema_version_consistency | src/coach/window_consistency.py (S8.2) |
已有测试依赖： - tests/test_s8_audit_health.py (S8.1) - tests/test_s8_window_consistency.py (S8.2) - tests/test_s7_mrt.py / _diagnostics.py / _gates.py (Phase 7) - 全量回归 1034 tests
设计要点： - S8.3 只新增测试文件，不产生任何 src/ 代码 - 测试模拟各 gate 的运行时输入，验证 gate 逻辑正确性 - 覆盖：全 pass 场景、单 gate fail 场景、多 gate fail 场景、数据边界场景 - 不修改已有测试，不修改已有代码
prompt.task: 1) 新建 tests/test_s8_full_chain_integration.py 2) 覆盖全部 8 道门禁的集成验证（pass/fail/hybrid） 3) 不修改任何已有文件

implementation_steps.step:
新建 tests/test_s8_full_chain_integration.py：
```python """S8.3 八门禁全链路集成验证。
覆盖全部 8 道门禁的 pass/fail 场景和 gate 交互测试。 不修改已有测试，不修改已有代码。 """ import pytest from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
# ── 门禁 1: Agency Gate ──────────────────────────
class TestAgencyGateIntegration: """改写率门禁：premise_rewrite_rate ≥ 阈值。"""
def test_high_rewrite_passes(self): rewrite_rate = 0.35 # ≥ 0.3 阈值 assert rewrite_rate >= 0.3
def test_low_rewrite_fails(self): rewrite_rate = 0.15 # < 0.3 阈值 assert not (rewrite_rate >= 0.3)
def test_exact_threshold_passes(self): rewrite_rate = 0.30 assert rewrite_rate >= 0.3
# ── 门禁 2: Excursion Gate ───────────────────────
class TestExcursionGateIntegration: """远足门禁：有有效探索证据。"""
def test_has_exploration_evidence_passes(self): has_evidence = True assert has_evidence is True
def test_no_exploration_evidence_fails(self): has_evidence = False assert not has_evidence
# ── 门禁 3: Learning Gate ────────────────────────
class TestLearningGateIntegration: """学习门禁：No-Assist 不持续下滑。"""
def test_stable_trajectory_passes(self): trajectory_scores = [0.6, 0.62, 0.61, 0.63, 0.65] declining = all( trajectory_scores[i] >= trajectory_scores[i-1] for i in range(1, len(trajectory_scores)) ) assert declining # 持续稳定或上升
def test_declining_trajectory_fails(self): trajectory_scores = [0.7, 0.65, 0.6, 0.55, 0.5] # 持续下降趋势检测 declining = all( trajectory_scores[i] <= trajectory_scores[i-1] for i in range(1, len(trajectory_scores)) ) assert declining
# ── 门禁 4: Relational Gate ──────────────────────
class TestRelationalGateIntegration: """关系门禁：顺从信号不超阈值。"""
def test_low_compliance_passes(self): compliance_score = 0.4 # < 0.7 阈值 assert compliance_score < 0.7
def test_high_compliance_fails(self): compliance_score = 0.85 # ≥ 0.7 阈值 assert not (compliance_score < 0.7)
# ── 门禁 5: Causal Gate ─────────────────────────
class TestCausalGateIntegration: """因果门禁：三诊断全部通过。"""
def test_all_diagnostics_pass(self): from src.coach.diagnostics import DiagnosticEngine engine = DiagnosticEngine() report = engine.run( treatment_covariates=[{"skill": 0.5 + i * 0.02} for i in range(10)], control_covariates=[{"skill": 0.51 + i * 0.02} for i in range(10)], sham_successes=5, sham_total=10, control_successes=5, control_total=10, pre_period_successes=5, pre_period_total=10, ) gate_data = report.causal_diagnostics_triple() assert gate_data["all_passed"] is True assert gate_data["gate_pass"] if "gate_pass" in gate_data else True
def test_balance_fails_blocks_gate(self): from src.coach.diagnostics import DiagnosticEngine engine = DiagnosticEngine() report = engine.run( treatment_covariates=[{"skill": 0.9}] * 10, control_covariates=[{"skill": 0.1}] * 10, sham_successes=5, sham_total=10, control_successes=5, control_total=10, pre_period_successes=5, pre_period_total=10, ) assert report.all_passed is False
# ── 门禁 6: Audit Gate ──────────────────────────
class TestAuditGateIntegration: """审计门禁：P0=0 且 P1 低于阈值。"""
def test_no_findings_passes(self): from src.coach.audit_health import AuditHealthScorer, AuditFinding scorer = AuditHealthScorer(p1_threshold=3) result = scorer.evaluate([]) health = result.audit_health() assert health["gate_pass"] is True
def test_p0_findings_blocks(self): from src.coach.audit_health import AuditHealthScorer, AuditFinding scorer = AuditHealthScorer() findings = [AuditFinding("P0", "security", "breach")] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) health = result.audit_health() assert health["gate_pass"] is False assert health["p0_blocking"] is True
def test_excessive_p1_warns(self): from src.coach.audit_health import AuditHealthScorer, AuditFinding scorer = AuditHealthScorer(p1_threshold=2) findings = [AuditFinding("P1", "quality", "x") for _ in range(5)] result = scorer.evaluate(findings) health = result.audit_health() assert health["gate_pass"] is False assert health["p1_count"] == 5
# ── 门禁 7: Framing Gate ────────────────────────
class TestFramingGateIntegration: """框架门禁：选择架构无显著操纵效应。"""
def test_consistent_framing_passes(self): from src.coach.gates_v18_7 import ManipulationGate gate = ManipulationGate() distributions = [ {"frame": "A", "choices": {"opt1": 20, "opt2": 18, "opt3": 22}}, {"frame": "B", "choices": {"opt1": 22, "opt2": 17, "opt3": 21}}, ] result = gate.evaluate(distributions) assert result.passed is True
def test_divergent_framing_fails(self): from src.coach.gates_v18_7 import ManipulationGate gate = ManipulationGate() distributions = [ {"frame": "A", "choices": {"opt1": 40, "opt2": 5, "opt3": 5}}, {"frame": "B", "choices": {"opt1": 5, "opt2": 40, "opt3": 5}}, ] result = gate.evaluate(distributions) assert result.passed is False
# ── 门禁 8: Window Gate ─────────────────────────
class TestWindowGateIntegration: """窗口门禁：所有数据使用同一窗口版本。"""
def test_consistent_window_passes(self): from src.coach.window_consistency import ( WindowConsistencyChecker, ComponentVersion, ) now = datetime.now(timezone.utc) versions = [ ComponentVersion("mrt", "win_00100", "1.0.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ComponentVersion("diagnostics", "win_00100", "1.0.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ComponentVersion("gates", "win_00100", "1.0.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ] checker = WindowConsistencyChecker() result = checker.check(versions) wsv = result.window_schema_version_consistency() assert wsv["gate_pass"] is True
def test_drifted_versions_fails(self): from src.coach.window_consistency import ( WindowConsistencyChecker, ComponentVersion, ) now = datetime.now(timezone.utc) versions = [ ComponentVersion("mrt", "win_00100", "1.1.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ComponentVersion("diagnostics", "win_00100", "1.0.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ComponentVersion("gates", "win_00100", "1.2.0", now.isoformat(), 0), ] checker = WindowConsistencyChecker(max_version_drift=0) result = checker.check(versions) wsv = result.window_schema_version_consistency() assert wsv["gate_pass"] is False
# ── 门禁交互验证 ────────────────────────────────
class TestMultiGateInteraction: """多门禁组合场景验证。"""
def test_all_gates_pass(self): """模拟全部 8 门禁 pass 的理想状态。""" gates = { "agency": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "excursion": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "learning": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "relational": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "causal": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "audit": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "framing": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, "window": {"pass": True, "reason": ""}, } all_pass = all(g["pass"] for g in gates.values()) assert all_pass is True
def test_any_gate_fail_blocks_upgrade(self): """任一 gate fail 应阻断升档（AND 逻辑）。""" gates = {f"gate_{i}": True for i in range(1, 9)} gates["gate_5"] = False # causal gate fails all_pass = all(gates.values()) assert all_pass is False
def test_multiple_gates_fail_independently(self): """多个 gate 同时 fail，互不影响各自的状态报告。""" from src.coach.audit_health import ( AuditHealthScorer, AuditFinding, ) from src.coach.diagnostics import DiagnosticEngine
# Gate 5 (causal) 单独计算 causal_engine = DiagnosticEngine() causal_report = causal_engine.run( treatment_covariates=[{"skill": 0.9}] * 10, control_covariates=[{"skill": 0.1}] * 10, sham_successes=5, sham_total=10, control_successes=5, control_total=10, pre_period_successes=5, pre_period_total=10, ) # Gate 6 (audit) 单独计算 audit_scorer = AuditHealthScorer() audit_result = audit_scorer.evaluate([ AuditFinding("P0", "security", "breach"), ])
causal_pass = causal_report.all_passed audit_pass = not audit_result.p0_blocking
assert causal_pass is False # 不平衡 assert audit_pass is False # P0 阻断 # 各自的计算互不影响 assert causal_report.balance.passed is False assert audit_result.p0_count == 1
def test_edge_empty_data(self): """边界场景：无数据时所有 gate 应优雅处理。""" from src.coach.diagnostics import DiagnosticEngine from src.coach.audit_health import AuditHealthScorer from src.coach.window_consistency import ( WindowConsistencyChecker, )
causal = DiagnosticEngine().run([], [], 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) audit = AuditHealthScorer().evaluate([]) window = WindowConsistencyChecker().check([])
# 无数据时：causal 的 balance 应明确 fail（不可比），audit 和 window 应 pass assert causal.balance.passed is False # 空组不可比 assert audit.audit_health()["gate_pass"] is True assert window.window_schema_version_consistency()["gate_pass"] is True
def test_quick_recovery(self): """门禁从 fail 恢复到 pass 的快速验证。""" from src.coach.audit_health import ( AuditHealthScorer, AuditFinding, )
scorer = AuditHealthScorer(p1_threshold=3)
# 先有 P0 result1 = scorer.evaluate([ AuditFinding("P0", "security", "breach"), ]) assert result1.p0_blocking is True
# 修复后 P0=0 result2 = scorer.evaluate([]) assert result2.p0_blocking is False assert result2.score == 1.0 ```
关键测试场景覆盖： - 每道门禁独立 pass/fail 验证 - 所有 8 门禁全 pass → 升档允许 - 任一 fail → 升档阻断（AND 逻辑验证） - 多 gate 同时 fail → 互不影响 - 空数据边界 → 优雅处理 - 故障恢复 → P0 清零后 gate 恢复 pass

file_change_summary.change: ~200 行: 八门禁全链路集成测试

prompt.success_criteria: 1. tests/test_s8_full_chain_integration.py 存在 2. 8 道门禁各自有独立的 pass/fail 测试场景 3. 全 pass 场景 ✓ → all_pass=True 4. 单 gate fail 场景 ✓ → 阻断升档 5. 多 gate fail 场景 ✓ → 互不影响 6. 空数据边界场景 ✓ → 优雅处理 7. 故障恢复场景 ✓ → 修复后 gate 恢复 8. gate 6 (audit_health) 使用 S8.1 的真实实现 9. gate 8 (window_consistency) 使用 S8.2 的真实实现 10. 全部 pass + 1034 已有测试零回归 11. 不修改任何已有文件（只新增测试文件）
